result.markdown: --- title: "Week 3: Time series decomposition" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Transforming data to remove some sources of variation * Decomposing a time series into trend-cycle, seasonal and remainder components * Seasonal adjustment ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Chapter 3 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/decomposition.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Tutorial exercises (in class or on your own) - Complete Exercise 2, 3, 10 from [Section 3.7](https://otexts.com/fpp3/decomposition-exercises.html) of the book. - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [GA1](../assignments/G1.qmd) is due on Tuesday 24 March. * [IA2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Thursday 02 April. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 3 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 18 March.
